plan.summary: Extract shared EditorDialogValidation helper from 26 EditorDialog code-behinds with inline validation boilerplate

patterns.description: One inline required TextBox check in OnSave, followed only by error collapse and DialogResult assignment
patterns.transformation: Add using example-project.App.Shared; replace the single required-field boilerplate with EditorDialogValidation.ValidateRequired(...) and ClearError(ErrorMessage)

patterns.description: Two or three back-to-back inline required TextBox checks in OnSave with no other validation branches
patterns.transformation: Add using example-project.App.Shared; collapse repeated checks into one EditorDialogValidation.ValidateRequired(ErrorMessage, (Box1, msg1), (Box2, msg2)) call

patterns.description: One required TextBox check plus an int/decimal TryParse validation
patterns.transformation: Add using example-project.App.Shared; use ValidateRequired for the text check, keep the TryParse inline (domain-specific), use ClearError

patterns.description: One required TextBox check plus validation on a non-TextBox control (ComboBox, DatePicker)
patterns.transformation: Add using example-project.App.Shared; use ValidateRequired for the TextBox check, keep the non-TextBox validation inline, use ClearError

shared_dependencies.change: Create new static helper class with ValidateRequired(TextBlock errorMessage, TextBox input, string message), a params overload ValidateRequired(TextBlock, params (TextBox, string)[]), and ClearError(TextBlock errorMessage)
